Maximum allowed color component value.
MAX_WEIGHT - Static variable in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow

MenuButton - Class in microui.component
A hierarchical menu button component that can contain both plain items and sub-menus.
MenuButton() - Constructor for class microui.component.MenuButton
Constructs a default MenuButton with the text "Menu Button".
MenuButton(String) - Constructor for class microui.component.MenuButton
Constructs a MenuButton with specified text, centered on the screen.
MenuButton(String, float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.component.MenuButton
Constructs a MenuButton with specified text, position, and dimensions.
MenuButton.DirectionMode - Enum Class in microui.component
Enumeration defining the direction modes for sub-menu placement.
mergeLines() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Merges the current line with the next line.
mergeLines(int) - Method in class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Merges a line with the line below it.
Metrics - Class in microui.util
Metrics collection utility for tracking object creation statistics.
MicroUI - Class in microui
Core initialization and metadata class for the MicroUI library.

MicroUIException - Exception in microui.core.exception
Base exception class for all MicroUI framework exceptions.
MicroUIException(String) - Constructor for exception microui.core.exception.MicroUIException
Constructs a MicroUIException with the specified detail message.
MIDDLE - Enum constant in enum class microui.constants.AutoResizeMode
Medium text size - balanced size for general use.
MIN_ID - Static variable in class microui.core.base.View
Minimum allowed numeric identifier value.
MIN_PRIORITY - Static variable in class microui.core.base.View
Minimum allowed priority value.
MIN_VALUE - Static variable in class microui.core.style.AbstractColor
Minimum allowed color component value.
MIN_WEIGHT - Static variable in class microui.core.effect.AbstractShadow
Minimum allowed shadow weight value.
mouseEvent(MouseEvent) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Processes mouse events from the Processing environment.
mouseWheel(MouseEvent) - Method in class microui.component.Knob
Handles mouse wheel events when the mouse is within the knob's diameter.
mouseWheel(MouseEvent) - Method in class microui.component.MenuButton
Handles mouse wheel scrolling for the menu hierarchy.
mouseWheel(MouseEvent) - Method in class microui.component.TextArea
Handles mouse wheel scrolling.
mouseWheel(MouseEvent) - Method in class microui.core.base.Container
Handles mouse wheel events by propagating them to scrollable child components.
mouseWheel(MouseEvent) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Handles mouse wheel events by propagating them to the current container.
mouseWheel(MouseEvent) - Method in interface microui.core.interfaces.Scrollable
Called when a mouse wheel event occurs.
mouseWheel(MouseEvent) - Method in class microui.core.LinearRangeControl
Handles mouse wheel events for value adjustment.
mouseWheel(MouseEvent, boolean) - Method in class microui.core.LinearRangeControl
Handles mouse wheel events with an additional condition for value adjustment.
moveCursorTo(int, int) - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Moves the cursor to the specified row and column.
moveCursorTo(Direction) - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Moves the cursor one step in the specified direction.
moveCursorTo(Direction, int) - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Moves the cursor in the specified direction by the specified number of steps.
moveCursorToEndOfLine() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Moves the cursor to the end of the current line.
moveCursorToEndOfText() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Moves the cursor to the end of the text (last row, end of last line).
moveCursorToStartOfLine() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Moves the cursor to the start of the current line (column 0).
moveCursorToStartOfText() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Moves the cursor to the start of the text (row 0, column 0).
MultiLineTextController - Class in microui.core.controller
Controller for managing multi-line text with line-based operations and undo/redo functionality.
MultiLineTextController() - Constructor for class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Constructs a MultiLineTextController with one empty line.
